g.text: Adaptive C-PERSIST: repair once, reuse the repaired state

text.style: font-size: 7.6px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Liberation Sans', 'Nimbus Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #475569

g.text: The visual tail is bought at the first follow-up. Fixed K=1 buys it again; adaptive reuse mostly appends text.
